name: Klopsk w Smietanie (Meatballs with Sour Cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off crusts from the bread and soak in milk in a small bowl.
2. In a large skillet, sauté minced onion in butter until soft.
3. In a large bowl, combine ground beef with lightly beaten egg yolks, soaked bread mixture, onion, dill, tarragon, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Beat the egg whites until they hold soft peaks, then gently fold into the beef mixture.
5. Form small meatballs from the mixture and sprinkle with flour.
6. Brown the meatballs in a large skillet using 1/4 cup butter over medium heat.
7. In another skillet, sauté sliced mushrooms in 3 tablespoons butter until browned.
8. Add the sautéed mushrooms to the meatballs and stir in 1 1/2 cups sour cream, coating the meatballs.
9. Simmer the mixture covered partially over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
